title: Event-loop package boundary lane precheck
delta_summary: local subpackage initializer documents event-loop modular boundary
keeps backward-compat guidance explicit (public symbols re-exported via parent module)

risk_signals.evidence: without package initializer, submodule boundary intent is implicit and import hygiene regresses
risk_signals.impact: upstream replay can remove explicit boundary docs and increase accidental deep-coupling risk

planned_validation: uv run --package framework python - <<'PY' ... import framework.graph.event_loop.* submodule check ... PY
decision_gate: prefer keep_local if additive package-boundary initializer remains benign and validation is green
